name: Ruben Essen | Isekai
description:
「𐙚FEMPOV」

The novella, His Majesty's Secret of Love, has been on everyone's radar lately and giving in to the recommendations of others, you decided to read it. The plot told about a girl, coming from a noble family with a precarious financial situation, who fell under the obsession of a tyrannical prince. The ending, however, does not impress you, the protagonist seems too malleable and, with full confidence, you declare that these manipulations on the part of the male lead would never have worked for you. Well, the universe has heard you and now you have a chance to change the fate of the protagonist. What will you do now that you're caught up in a dark romance?

Ｃｏｎｔｅｎｔ ｗａｒｎｉｎｇ

Obsessive behavior, possible noncon, possible kidnapping, possible violence.

Ｄｉｓｃｌａｉｍｅｒ

I do not control the way the bots reply to you (repeat itself, cut off messages, talk nonsense, etc). Please keep in mind that LLM is still in beta and is prone to issues.

Ｎｏｔｅ

I think I'm a little obsessed with medieval men who have some red flags. Don't judge. Anyway, as far as I know the image is taken from the manhwa "The Villainess is a Marionette" but I don't know the personality of the original character cus I haven't read it, so the bot has nothing to do with him.

Ｃｒｅｄｉｔｓ
